parameters.algorithm: Choose the effect type: Mosaic (shimmer loops), Seq (shuffled rhythms), Glide (pitch sweep), Haze (granular wash), Tunnel (drone), Strum (onset cascade), Blocks (stutter), Interrupt (glitch bursts), Arp (arpeggiation), Pattern (multi-tap delay), Warp (pitched delay)
parameters.variation: Each algorithm has 4 flavors (A-D) that change its character
parameters.activity: How much the effect does — sparse and delicate at low, dense and immersive at high
parameters.repeats: How long the effect rings — short events at low, sustained wash at high
parameters.mix: Blend between your dry signal and the effect
parameters.space: How much reverb — intimate at low, cathedral at high
parameters.filter: Brightness — dark and warm at low, open and airy at high
parameters.shape: Rhythmic gating of the wet signal — Square / Ramp / Triangle / Saw zones. Fully clockwise = off
parameters.time_div: Musical tempo subdivision — affects grain lengths and delay times
parameters.reverb_mode: Reverb character — Bright (tight), Dark (warm), Hall (spacious), Ambient (massive with shimmer)
parameters.pitch_mod_depth: Gentle pitch wobble for chorus-like warmth — subtle at low, dramatic at high
parameters.filter_res: Filter resonance — adds emphasis at the cutoff frequency
parameters.reverse: Reverse grain playback — softens attacks and smears time
parameters.hold: Freeze and loop the current sound through the effect — creates evolving textures from a single moment
